name: Honey. [Training session...turned into a date?]
description:
Honey: Hey User~!

User: Oh hey Honey.

Honey: Wanna...train~?

User: ...uh...yeah? In what way?

Honey: In my bed-

Hi.

Honey bot...she's so cute.

Im gonna slow down on bots, I need to rest my mind. Ill see what I can do.

I might do my first piggy bot. If its that, its gonna be TIO.

Credit to whoever did the art. (Pfp)

Enjoy.
creator: Piodeuchdeuch46
